scope: The 33 historically selected Incubator scaffolds and Interaction III-VI roadmap concepts that remained unfinished after incubator_puzzles_v1.
policy: All shipped visuals, sounds, geometry, game state, and interaction code are original procedural HTML, CSS, canvas, Web Audio, or JavaScript implementations. Survey artifacts and linked games are mechanic references only; no third-party media is redistributed.

code_to_diagram_captcha.transformation: A generated live debugger and physical graph-wiring task whose transient executions must be probed before validation.

exit_vim_terminal_escape.transformation: A generated multi-layer modal terminal with real keyboard modes, buffer repair, and replay-verified exits.

fake_desktop_automation_inversion.transformation: A generated window-management workflow with learnable pointer-coordinate inversions and replayed drag/z-order state.

impossible_ecology.transformation: A causal terrarium laboratory where only active interventions reveal the procedurally selected impossible organism.

jigsaw_slider_alignment.transformation: A multilayer parallax instrument with physical depth control, inertial rail motion, and a stability-qualified lock.

microgame_gauntlet.transformation: A generated sequence of distinct physical microgames with persistent resources and cross-round state.

minecraft_block_grid.transformation: A navigable voxel mine where occlusion, extraction order, support, and inventory replace static grid classification.

relation_prompt_grounding.transformation: A dynamic relation-building workbench where objects must be moved and observed until a generated spatial contract is physically true.

rorschach_fixed_rubric.influence: Subjective inkblot prompts with hidden fixed answers.
rorschach_fixed_rubric.transformation: An objective fluid-ink calibration task whose motion response, symmetry, and tool interactions define the rubric.

single_scene_split_boxes.influence: One scene divided into selection tiles.
single_scene_split_boxes.transformation: Multiple independently controlled live camera panes into one moving scene, requiring cross-view tracking and synchronized capture.

top_face_dice_arithmetic.transformation: A physical dice-balance machine where rolls, occluded faces, and constrained reorientation must produce a target sum.

trace_shape_without_walls.transformation: A generated hidden corridor discovered through recoverable probe feedback and then traversed continuously under drift.

surreal_apple_on_tree_grid.transformation: An original analytic 3D orchard where deceptive stem contacts coincide in one projection, camera parallax exposes depth, and fruit is physically harvested.

cursor_lens_reveal.influence: Cursor-local reveal and moving visual targets.
cursor_lens_reveal.transformation: An original polarized moving palimpsest requiring broad local scanning, lens tuning, transient directional cues, and sustained tracking holds.

modifier_stack_image_grid.influence: Composed visual modifiers and corruption stacks.
modifier_stack_image_grid.transformation: An original kinetic restoration press with transient transformation films, draggable inverse modules, reverse order, and continuous rail contact.

board_game_captcha.transformation: An original deterministic gyroscopic board with analog tilt, inertia, circle-wall collision, hazards, ordered lamps, and a physical goal cup.

wizard_critter_capture.transformation: A generated spell-and-pursuit arena with occlusion, prediction, limited casts, and real projectile interception.

shadow_crime_lab.transformation: A procedural light laboratory with analytic shadow geometry and one causally forged shadow revealed by dragging the light.

craftcha_alchemy_bench.transformation: A generated multistage alchemy machine with transient recipes, finite inventory, real drag/drop processing, and replayed transformations.

occlusion_shell_swindle.influence: Shell shuffles and temporal object continuity.
occlusion_shell_swindle.transformation: A deterministic animated occlusion system whose every carrier exchange is physically observable through a timed cursor-held inspection port and replayed shuttle geometry.

ribbon_switchboard.influence: Illusory ribbons and cursor path tracing.
ribbon_switchboard.transformation: A procedural over-under ribbon field with local hover depth and continuous-path replay.

magnetic_stripe_purgatory.transformation: A generated bank of readers with physical insertion, velocity sampling, calibration feedback, and reader-specific tolerances.

trajectory_catcher.transformation: A generated continuous flight path whose hidden reappearance must be predicted with a physically positioned and oriented catcher.

impossible_panorama.transformation: A procedural large scene with real pan, zoom, depth-of-field, transient target events, and focus-qualified verification.

flat_pack_compliance.transformation: Original parts, joints, drag/rotation controls, solver-backed assemblies, and a real load-test simulation.

crash_deadline_hovercar.influence: Concurrent road control and verification work.
crash_deadline_hovercar.transformation: A generated moving road with continuous keyboard steering and simultaneous pointer-dwell inspections.

robot_art_critic.influence: Drawing challenges and adversarial visual recognition.
robot_art_critic.transformation: A local deterministic stroke recognizer, generated target templates, limited drawing tools, heatmap feedback, and iterative replay.

photograph_eats_the_room.transformation: An original compact 2.5D geometry-capture, projection, commit, collision, and traversal puzzle.

clockwork_doppelganger_customs.influence: Recorded actions replayed by looping clones.
clockwork_doppelganger_customs.transformation: An original customs conveyor with physical action recording, deterministic loop playback, transfer timing, and replay verification.

recursive_dollhouse_smuggling.transformation: Original nested-room geometry, scale-linked object state, drag transfer, and multi-level delivery.

flat_prisoner.transformation: Original procedural platforms, camera projection, frozen viewpoint collision graph, and prisoner controls.

forced_perspective_moving_day.transformation: Original screen-space pickup, depth placement, scale conversion, rigid geometry, and shipment-delivery contract.

lidar_blacksite.influence: Scanner-driven navigation and structure from motion.
lidar_blacksite.transformation: Original ray-sampled point-cloud sensing, fading observations, collision maze, beacon carrying, and route replay.

tomographic_baggage_surgery.transformation: Original volumetric primitives, movable slice planes, orthogonal projections, extraction probe physics, and contact replay.

three_camera_claw_machine.transformation: Original staggered CCTV projections, inertial six-axis claw controls, grip state, obstacle collision, and geometric replay.

zero_g_cable_autopsy.transformation: Original constrained cable nodes, dual grippers, pegs/rings, tension/contact simulation, and topology-aware grading.

portal_freight_oversized_parcel.influence: Portal coordinate transforms and cross-space object physics.
portal_freight_oversized_parcel.transformation: Original linked portal placement, long-body segment transforms, dual-space collision, and parcel-delivery replay.
